repo_prior_art.cite: pid_rdd_manipulation_bounded_v1: budgeted selection envelope; pid_ordinal_principal_strata_v1: adjacent principal-strata LP, neither states Lee always-selected finite-(Gamma,kappa) alpha profile

published_prior_art.cite: ShepherdGilbertJemiaiRotnitzky2006 / JemiaiRotnitzkyShepherdGilbert2007 / ShepherdGilbertDupont2011 already use principal-stratum sensitivity with outcome-selection log-odds style parameters; Lee2009SampleSelection and LaffersNedela2017Sensitivity cover Lee/sample-selection sharp sensitivity comparators

repo_prior_art.cite: ManskiNonparametricBounds_Study gives generic bounded-outcome algebra only; no finite selected-mixture collider equality-case classification

published_prior_art.cite: ZetterstromSjolanderWaernbaum2025Selection sharpens Smith-VanderWeele selection-bias bounds; not Lee alpha-coupled, but close on finite sensitivity tightening/equality cases

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The beta/psi comparator is overstated: the Shepherd/Jemiai/Rotnitzky/Dupont family uses log-odds-style outcome-principal-stratum sensitivity links, so an interior selected-mixture odds-ratio endpoint is not by itself evidence that no beta/psi representation can pin the same finite table.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Misses Okamoto2025, Robustify and tighten the Lee bounds, Econometrics Journal, which is a direct 2025 Lee-bounds relaxation beyond deterministic monotonicity and must be separated from the proposed finite-(Gamma,kappa) regime.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; to reach flagship, the proposal needs a sharp open-regime theorem proving strict non-equivalence against margin-free odds-ratio principal-stratification sensitivity models, not only a new finite-table parametrization.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The odds-ratio constraints are called half-spaces, but they are quadratic inequalities in t; revise the terminology to avoid implying convex-linear geometry.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The non-subsumption route against beta/psi principal-stratum sensitivity is qualitative; it needs a concrete parameter-space map or incompatibility certificate showing why log-odds sensitivity cannot reproduce the displayed endpoint law.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Okamoto2025 and explicitly compare stochastic monotonicity/symmetry Lee bounds to the finite harmed-stratum plus selected-mixture odds-ratio restriction.

Replace the beta/psi non-representability prose with a formal map: define the beta/psi finite binary table, show whether beta=log(OR) reproduces the armwise endpoint, and isolate the exact extra alpha/kappa coupling that remains new.

Upgrade the numerical witness into an open-set certificate with inequalities proving both G,H positive, all active cells interior, and no equivalent conditional-Lee or margin-free principal-stratification odds-ratio representation.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature comparison and non-equivalence statement before another novelty pass; the finite alpha-profile idea survives, but the flagship-tier claim is not yet earned.
